Create a subdirectory for an analysis interval

create_int_fold.Rd

Create a subdirectory for an analysis interval

Usage

create_int_fold(int, foldername)

Arguments

int

Named list element representing a single interval; the name is "Full" for whole-recording analyses or an arbitrary label for sub-intervals, and the value is a numeric vector c(start, end).

foldername

Character; base directory in which the interval subdirectory will be created.

On this page
